creator: yongari@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is *INTENTIONAL* one to protect hardware from over-current 
damage as well as saving more power. This is no reason to make 
WOL work on 1000baseT link. 
When system is up from sleep or S3 via WOL, 1000baseT link would be 
established again.
